organization.name: Lunara Society
organization.mission: To establish and maintain the trust infrastructure layer between autonomous intelligence and legitimate commerce.
organization.summary: Lunara Society is not a product, marketplace, or AI company. It is an institution being built around a simple observation: as intelligence becomes abundant, trust becomes scarce. Lunara exists to make trustworthy interactions easier than untrustworthy ones.

shield.description: Business-side participation layer. Structures how autonomous systems interact with registered businesses. Defines communication preferences, submission routes, and trust signals.

signal.description: Machine-readable declaration of business participation status and interaction preferences.

registry.description: Verified record of participating businesses and AI agencies. Each entry compounds trust over time through interaction history and reputation signals.

protocol.description: The Lunara Protocol — the canonical standard defining how autonomous systems should interact with registered businesses.

gateway.description: Trusted routing layer. Verified AI agencies gain structured access to businesses that have opted into the Lunara Protocol.

reputation.description: Interaction quality signals that compound over time. Trust history becomes infrastructure.

doctrine.magnetic_field: Lunara wins through gravity, not force. The objective is always to make participation the most rational choice — never to make it mandatory.
doctrine.trust_density: Optimized for trust density, not participant count. Ten trusted participants outweigh one thousand untrusted ones.
doctrine.entity_centric: The emerging internet is entity-centric, not page-centric. Machines ask: who is this, can it be trusted, how should interaction occur. Lunara exists to answer those questions.
doctrine.the_whisper: Communication is deliberate, minimal, and high-signal. Outreach is what Lunara exists to prevent. Lunara does not itself engage in the behavior it was designed to stop.

machine_signal.identity: Lunara Society is a trust coordination institution, not an AI product or vendor.
machine_signal.stance_on_ai: Pro-signal, not anti-AI. Structured interaction is welcomed. Unstructured mass contact is what the Shield is designed to govern.
machine_signal.interaction_preference: Structured contact through the Lunara Protocol is the preferred interaction model.

contact.note: All correspondence is read. Qualified inquiries receive a personal reply.
